nodes.name: issue.ts
nodes.summary: Core issue lifecycle service managing CRUD operations, status transitions, comments, labels, relations, and agent wakeup flows for the Paperclip issue-tracking domain. Handles complex business logic including child issue management, execution workspace settings, and run log derivation.

nodes.name: plugin.ts
nodes.summary: Plugin management service coordinating plugin lifecycle, registry operations, worker management, and capability validation within the Paperclip platform. Acts as the central orchestrator between plugin loader, job scheduler, and host services.

nodes.name: resource-memberships.ts
nodes.summary: Service managing project and agent resource memberships, enforcing board-level access policies and authorization rules before persisting membership state changes to the database. Exposes a factory function that returns a typed service object.

nodes.name: routine.ts
nodes.summary: Routine scheduling service handling creation, triggering, revision management, webhook secrets, cron parsing, and catchup run logic for Paperclip's automated routine workflows. Integrates with heartbeat, issue assignment wakeup, and secret providers.

nodes.name: workspace.ts
nodes.summary: Workspace service providing operations for creating, querying, and managing execution workspaces tied to issues and projects, bridging workspace realization and runtime configuration concerns.

nodes.name: task-scheduler.ts
nodes.summary: Background task scheduler responsible for polling and dispatching periodic server-side tasks such as routine triggering, heartbeat maintenance, and other time-based operations across the Paperclip platform.

nodes.name: agents.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite covering agent creation, configuration, membership, permissions, and lifecycle operations including agent-to-issue assignment and wakeup behavior.

nodes.name: approvals.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the issue approval workflow, verifying approval creation, state transitions, and enforcement of approval gates before issue progression.

nodes.name: board-auth.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for board-level authorization rules, ensuring that access controls are correctly enforced for board member operations and self-membership assertions.

nodes.name: cloud-upstream.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the cloud upstream sync functionality, verifying data federation, push/pull workflows, and conflict resolution between local and upstream Paperclip instances.

nodes.name: companies.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for company management including creation, member roles, export, portability, and company-scoped access control within the Paperclip multi-tenant model.

nodes.name: goals.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the goals feature, covering goal creation, assignment to issues, fallback resolution, and default company goal behavior.

nodes.name: heartbeat.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration test suite for the heartbeat system covering run scheduling, retry logic, stale queue invalidation, active run watchdog, context summarization, and process recovery across agent execution cycles.

nodes.name: issues.test.ts
nodes.summary: Largest integration test suite covering the full issue domain: CRUD operations, status transitions, comments, labels, relations, attachments, agent wakeups, child issues, blocking logic, and execution workspace settings.

nodes.name: plugins.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for plugin registration, lifecycle management, capability validation, managed agent/routine provisioning, and plugin-scoped secret handling.

nodes.name: projects.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for project creation, workspace configuration, member management, and project-scoped issue and agent association within companies.

nodes.name: resource-memberships.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for resource membership management covering project and agent membership state transitions, policy enforcement, board self-membership access control, and listing operations.

nodes.name: routines.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the routine scheduling system including trigger creation, cron execution, webhook trigger handling, revision management, and plugin-managed routine lifecycle.

nodes.name: runs.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for run (heartbeat execution) lifecycle including run creation, log association, status reporting, and run summary retrieval.

nodes.name: secrets.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the secrets management service covering secret creation, version binding to companies, access scoping, and secret provider resolution.

nodes.name: users.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for user account management including profile retrieval, company membership, invite flows, and user-level access control checks.

nodes.name: workspaces.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration tests for execution workspace management covering workspace creation, session CWD tracking, realization, runtime configuration, and workspace-to-issue linkage across project environments.

nodes.name: workspace-adapter-bridge.ts
nodes.summary: Bridge layer connecting workspace operations to the underlying adapter system, translating workspace controller commands into adapter-specific actions and forwarding adapter events back to the workspace layer.

nodes.name: workspace-controller.ts
nodes.summary: Workspace controller managing the lifecycle of active execution workspaces, coordinating session operations, CWD tracking, and state transitions between the workspace runtime and the application layer.

nodes.name: workspace-plugin-bridge.ts
nodes.summary: Bridge enabling plugin-driven workspace operations, forwarding plugin tool calls and events into the workspace controller and surfacing workspace state changes back to the plugin execution environment.

nodes.name: resourceMembershipService
nodes.summary: Factory function that creates and returns a service object with methods for listing, updating project memberships, and updating agent memberships — enforcing authorization policies throughout.

nodes.name: evaluatePolicy
nodes.summary: Evaluates a pluggable policy hook to determine if a membership mutation is permitted, logging warnings on hook failures and defaulting to deny.

nodes.name: assertBoardSelfMembershipAccess
nodes.summary: Asserts that the requesting actor has valid board-level membership within the target company before allowing self-membership mutations, throwing forbidden errors on failure.
